titleStmt.title: SII 22.249: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 249. (A.R. No. 249 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. KAMPAṆA-UḌAIYĀR (KAMPA II) SON OF BOKKAṆA-UḌAIYĀR.

summary.p: The date is given as Sādhāraṇa, Siṁha, ba. 5, Rēvati which would correspond to A.D. 1370, August 11. (Śaka 1293 current). This records the assignment of three more families by order of the king for the supply of the same quantity of ghee and milk to the temple as mentioned in No. 248 above. Aḍaippattu Ilakkappar and Ānaigundi Viṭṭappar are mentioned here as the officers of the king who made the appointment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmanu maṇṭaleśvaran Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuva rāyarkaṇṭaṉ śrīvirapokkaṇa Uṭaiyar kumāra kampaṇa Uṭaiyarkkuc cellāniṉṟa sādhāraṇa varṣattu siṅha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum revatiyum peṟṟa tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūrkkoṭṭattuk kaḻumalanāṭṭup piramatecappaṟṟut tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār
viṭaiyiṉmel varuvārkkum Aṭaiyilaṉpu Uṭaiyāṟkum Uṭaiyar Aruḷicceyalppaṭikku Aṭaippattu Ilakkapparum Āṉaikunti viṭṭapparum Inta nāyaṉmāṟku tiruviḷakkukkuṭiyāka viṭṭa tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭil Irukkum maṉṟāṭikaḷil nilāṇṭai maṇiyakkoṉ makaṉ mutaliyaiyum cokkaṉ makaṉ peruṅkaṉāṉa vāṉava taraiyakkonaiyum Ivaṉ maccunaṉ tiruvaraṅkaṉaiyum
cantiṟātittavarai nāḷ Oṉṟukku peroṉṟukku Āḻākku neyyum Irunāḻi pālum Amutukku Aḷakkakkaṭavatāka viṭṭom Ippaṭikku Intak kuṭi muṉṟum nāḷoṉṟukku Uḻakku Āḻākku neyyum Aṟunāḻi pālum Inṉāḷ mutal cantrādityatavarai nāḷvaḻi Aḷakkakkaṭavatāka viṭṭom Itukku Aḻivu paṇṇu mavar keṅkaikkaraiyil kurāṟpacuvai koṉṟāṉ pāvattaip paṭuvarkaḷ Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
